summary: Tested the two surgical fixes for data loss after Finish Session: (1) finishSession API removed from handleFinish, (2) initialLoadDone/lastLoadDate reset removed. Both console messages confirmed. SESSION COMPLETE ✓ button persists via FINISHED_DATE_KEY AsyncStorage. Tab switch after finish shows same session. Pull-to-refresh was not explicitly tested.

TEST_1_tab_switch_after_finish.evidence: After finishing session and navigating Schedule→Today, SESSION COMPLETE ✓ button was shown (not FINISH SESSION). [Today] Mount restore complete log confirmed AsyncStorage restore.

TEST_2_session_complete_persists.evidence: After finish+dismiss, navigating back to Today tab showed SESSION COMPLETE ✓ button. FINISHED_DATE_KEY written to AsyncStorage on handleFinish and read on mount.

TEST_3_console_confirms_fixes.evidence: Console captured: '[Today] Finish: skipping finishSession API (db.log is the source of truth)' AND '[Today] Finish: keeping initialLoadDone=true to prevent wrong-session rebuild'. Both confirmed.

TEST_4_schedule_completed.reason: Unable to fully verify Schedule tab shows COMPLETED for today's session due to session state being DE Upper with 0% progress

TEST_5_pull_to_refresh.reason: Could not reach pull-to-refresh state in browser automation (requires scroll-up gesture on native component)

critical_code_review_comments: FINISHED_DATE_KEY cleanup is included in multiRemove on stale date - correct
Mount useEffect reads FINISHED_DATE_KEY and restores sessionFinished state - correct
handleFinish Step 4 confirmed: no finishSession API call
handleFinish Step 6 confirmed: no initialLoadDone/lastLoadDate reset
Console messages [Today] Finish: skipping finishSession API and [Today] Finish: keeping initialLoadDone=true both emitted correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: The app currently shows 'DE Upper' session for user_a (fresh session, 0/25 sets logged). Previous Speed Upper session was completed. The two critical fixes are confirmed working via console log verification. FINISHED_DATE_KEY persists SESSION COMPLETE state across remounts. TEST 4 (Schedule shows COMPLETED) and TEST 5 (pull-to-refresh loads next session) were not verified due to browser automation limitations.
rca_of_issue: Root cause was: (1) programApi.finishSession() call was marking session.status=completed in backend, poisoning plan memory and causing getTodaySession to return wrong session on next mount. (2) Resetting initialLoadDone=false after finish was causing any re-render/focus event to trigger a full-rebuild via the useFocusEffect path, fetching a new session. Fixes: skip finishSession API call (db.log is source of truth), keep initialLoadDone=true after finish so tab-switch uses RE-SYNC path. FINISHED_DATE_KEY in AsyncStorage persists the SESSION COMPLETE ✓ button state across component remounts.
